title: ImplementationContract
description: Pre-implementation agreement between worker and reviewers. Worker proposes concrete actions, edge case handling, and demo steps. qa_engineer and architecture_authority approve before implementation begins. Canonical protocol schema.

producer_type.description: The worker agent type that drafted this contract

plan_summary.description: Brief summary of the implementation approach

planned_actions.description: Concrete actions the worker will take to fulfill the TaskContract

touched_paths.description: File paths the implementation will create or modify

edge_cases.description: Edge cases the worker plans to handle

state_transitions.description: State transitions the implementation will introduce

non_goals.description: What this implementation explicitly will NOT do. Prevents scope creep.

demo_steps.description: Step-by-step procedure to demonstrate and verify completion

known_risks.description: Known risks identified during contract drafting

required_checks.description: Verification checks the worker must pass before declaring completion

approved_by.description: Agent types who approved the contract (e.g., ['qa_engineer', 'architecture_authority'])
